creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Fri Aug 17 04:34:23 2012
New Revision: 302666
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302666

Log:
  - update to 2.1.5
  - switch to setuptools
  
  while here:
  - add LICENSE (BSD)
  - strict python version to 2.x only
  - tab -> space in pkg-descr:WWW
  
  PR:		167124
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20 at gmail dot com>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (yzlin, ~4 months)

Modified:
  head/www/py-textile/Makefile
  head/www/py-textile/distinfo
  head/www/py-textile/pkg-descr
  head/www/py-textile/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/py-textile/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-textile/Makefile	Fri Aug 17 04:33:09 2012	(r302665)
+++ head/www/py-textile/Makefile	Fri Aug 17 04:34:23 2012	(r302666)
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	py-textile
-# Date created:		2008-09-05
-# Whom:			Yi-Jheng Lin <yzlin@cs.nctu.edu.tw>
+# Date created:				2008-09-05
+# Whom:					Yi-Jheng Lin <yzlin@cs.nctu.edu.tw>
 #
 # $FreeBSD$
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	textile
-PORTVERSION=	2.1.4
+PORTVERSION=	2.1.5
 CATEGORIES=	www textproc python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP \
 		GOOGLE_CODE
@@ -15,8 +15,10 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	yzlin@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Textile markup generator written in Python
 
+LICENSE=	BSD
+
 PROJECTHOST=	pytextile
-USE_PYTHON=	2.5+
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/www/py-textile/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-textile/distinfo	Fri Aug 17 04:33:09 2012	(r302665)
+++ head/www/py-textile/distinfo	Fri Aug 17 04:34:23 2012	(r302666)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (textile-2.1.4.tar.gz) = ca1b14ee4bd34cb72fc95e2960f4e591fc9d019196d7a1dfeaa17ca9ece89632
-SIZE (textile-2.1.4.tar.gz) = 13664
+SHA256 (textile-2.1.5.tar.gz) = b22a2e2fcb0e6b55a39b181d978d4b7429abf8504b09442dc55756fa98d3bcf6
+SIZE (textile-2.1.5.tar.gz) = 16541

Modified: head/www/py-textile/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-textile/pkg-descr	Fri Aug 17 04:33:09 2012	(r302665)
+++ head/www/py-textile/pkg-descr	Fri Aug 17 04:34:23 2012	(r302666)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 Textile is a Python implementation of the Textile
 (http://textism.com/tools/textile) markup language.
 
-WWW:	http://loopcore.com/python-textile/
+WWW: http://loopcore.com/python-textile/

==============================================================================

+++ head/www/py-textile/pkg-plist	Fri Aug 17 04:34:23 2012	(r302666)
